policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aps-17 - Audit for latest version of application framework'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+App+Service#IncidentremediationAppService#drcp-aps-17 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP App Service Site Slot Linux .NET version
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents the usage of older or outdated .NET versions. Periodically, newer versions are released for .NET software either due to security flaws or to include additional functionality. Using the latest .NET version for App Service apps is recommended in order to take advantage of security fixes and/or new functionalities. This policy only applies to Linux apps and requires the usage of a specific .NET version.

drcp.name: AppServiceSiteSlotLinuxDotNETVersion
drcp.controlDesc: Audit for latest version of application framework

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
Specify the supported .NET versions for Linux App Service.
